Notes: Replay a syntactically valid delete_rr for an RR that is already absent. The name exists so the UPDATE is anchored in-zone, but the target TXT RR is not present in the starting state.

Steps.Description: Attempt to delete an absent TXT RR at an existing in-zone name. The update is prerequisite-safe because the name is in use, but the specific RR does not exist.

Steps.Name: retry.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe that the TXT RRset remains absent after the UPDATE, regardless of reply code.
